problem id: ea2e88ca
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) XOR NOT SHL(4)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  10011100 -> 01110111
  11000101 -> 01111101
  00100101 -> 00111101
  11101111 -> 11111011
  00110001 -> 01111111
  11111011 -> 10111110
  11110100 -> 11111101
  00101011 -> 11011010

query: 00011100
predicted answer: 00110111
